verdict.answer_first: B is sharper: "Plain Python." A also answers first: "default to plain Python," but with more setup.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits harder: "pandas is usually the wrong tool"; A says "default" then surveys cases.
verdict.fabrication: B has the bigger unverified claim: "multi-second import"; A's "~0.5–1s" is also environment-dependent but more bounded.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to execute because it gives a working `csv.DictReader`/`DictWriter` snippet plus the row-vs-column rule.
